hypothesis.strategy: Improve 3 lowest-scoring articles (foundation-models-for-research, retrieval-augmented-generation, agentic-tree-search) with new technical sections, 2025-2026 papers, and 1 SVG diagram
hypothesis.reasoning: Foundation-models has depth=53 (massive room for improvement). RAG has currency=61 (needs recent papers). Agentic-tree-search has depth=67 (needs new sections). Past experiments show adding 4+ new sections yields large depth gains, and 2026 papers reliably move currency.

articles_improved.changes: Added FM taxonomy SVG diagram, hypothesis generation/lab validation section, multi-modal scientific FMs section, materials discovery section, FOUNDER world models. Added 7 new footnoted references.
Added MCTS-RAG section, Self-Routing RAG section, System 1/System 2 framework, 4 new trend items. Added 7 new footnoted references.

Added RL+tree search section (Tree-GRPO, DeepSearch, AT2PO, ToTRL), OR-Agent algorithm discovery section, learning application table, CogMCTS. Added 6 new footnoted references. Expanded See Also links.

result.lesson: RAG article had the biggest gain (+8.3) because currency jumped from 61 to 89 — adding recent MCTS-RAG and agentic RAG papers was highly effective. Foundation-models depth jumped from 53 to 76 with hypothesis generation and multi-modal FM sections.
